title: lib/db
description: This directory contains classes that implement the DBSplitter interface for various data types. The DBSplitter interface is used to generate input splits for the DataDrivenDBInputFormat class, which is used to read input data from a database table. The classes in this directory implement the split method, which takes a Configuration object, a ResultSet, and a column name as input, and returns a list of InputSplit objects. The InputSplit objects represent the splits of the data that will be processed by the DataDrivenDBInputFormat class. The classes in this directory handle different data types, such as BigDecimal, boolean, Date, Float, Integer, OracleDate, and Text, by implementing the split method in a way that is specific to each data type. The classes also handle NULL values in the split column and generate splits based on the minimum and maximum values of the split column. The classes in this directory collaborate with the DataDrivenDBInputFormat class to read input data from the database table and process the splits generated by the DBSplitter interface.
